mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_plan ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_plan ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_plan WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_plan WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_plan WHERE plan_category = #{planCategory} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_plan WHERE plan_category = #{planCategory}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_plan (title, title_en, title_zh, plan_detail, plan_detail_en, plan_detail_zh, plan_company, plan_category, plan_date, plan_end_date, is_auto_registration, author_email, recipients, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{titleEn}, #{titleZh}, #{planDetail}, #{planDetailEn}, #{planDetailZh}, #{planCompany}, #{planCategory}, #{planDate}, #{planEndDate}, #{isAutoRegistration}, #{authorEmail}, #{recipients}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_plan SET title = #{title}, title_en = #{titleEn}, title_zh = #{titleZh}, plan_detail = #{planDetail}, plan_detail_en = #{planDetailEn}, plan_detail_zh = #{planDetailZh}, plan_company = #{planCompany}, plan_category = #{planCategory}, plan_date = #{planDate}, plan_end_date = #{planEndDate}, is_auto_registration = #{isAutoRegistration}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, recipients = #{recipients}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
